title.en: The Jewish Life Cycle: From Birth to Eternity
title.he: מעגל החיים היהודי: מלידה ועד נצח
title.zh: 犹太生命周期：从出生到永恒

description.en: A comprehensive guide to Jewish life cycle ceremonies and traditions, from birth through death, including brit milah, bar/bat mitzvah, weddings, and mourning practices.
description.he: מדריך מקיף לטקסי ומסורות מעגל החיים היהודי, מלידה ועד מוות, כולל ברית מילה, בר/בת מצווה, חתונות ומנהגי אבלות.
description.zh: 犹太生命周期仪式和传统的全面指南，从出生到死亡，包括割礼、成人礼、婚礼和哀悼习俗。

author: Torah Light
practicalApplications: Understanding the meaning behind brit milah and naming ceremonies
Preparing for bar or bat mitzvah celebrations
Planning a Jewish wedding with traditional elements
Creating a Jewish home with mezuzah and kashrut
Supporting community members who are ill
Observing proper mourning customs and shiva practices
Honoring the memory of loved ones through yahrzeit and kaddish
learningObjectives: Understand the spiritual significance of each life cycle milestone
Learn the customs and rituals associated with Jewish life events
Appreciate how life cycle ceremonies connect individuals to community
Recognize the balance between tradition and contemporary practice
Understand Jewish approaches to joy, celebration, illness, and loss
